Templates › Defects / Snagging List

🔍 Defects / Snagging List

Document defects and outstanding items at practical completion — agree on remediation dates with the client.

How to use: Walk the site with the client, photograph defects, and agree on a completion date for each item. All fields are editable — click any text to change it.

Click to upload logo

NZ Tradie Tools — tradietools.nz

🔍 Defects / Snagging List

No sign-up required. Free forever.

How to use this template

  • Click any field to edit it
  • Fill in your business details first
  • Click "Download PDF" to save
  • Or click "Print" for a paper copy

Walk the site with the client, photograph defects, and agree on a completion date for each item.
